QW-100  SCOPE. This Part covers the qualification of welding procedures, welders, and welding operators. Welding procedure specifications shall be prepared in accordance with QW-200. Welders shall be qualified as required by QW-300. Essential and supplementary essential variables are as described in QW-250, except as provided by QW-280 for special processes. Performance qualification tests shall comply with QW-301, unless exempted by QW-190 for alternative examinations. For base metal groupings, refer to QW-403. For filler metal groupings, see QW-404. Thickness limits are subject to the requirements of QW-451.
